{
  FastCache.Singleton.g.cs:
using System;
using System.Threading;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    partial class FastCache
    {
        private static readonly Lazy<FastCache> _instance = new Lazy<FastCache>(() =>
        {
            return new FastCache();
        }, LazyThreadSafetyMode.None);
        public static FastCache Instance
        {
            get
            {
                return _instance.Value;
            }
        }
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.GenerateSingletonGenerator

}
